post.subject: Everthing will be alright...
post.body:
Its come to the time in my life where im just really really eternally depressed most of the time about one thing and one thing only; lonliness. Its come to light that there are those who find me funny and like my company, but none are potentially going to spend time with me when I need it most, listen to me, or generally be there and love me and be loved back... I still just have my computer... 

I have come to the stage where I dont want my computer as much anymore. I want people.
